Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3308 -u root school_management_mysql -e "
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS \\`TimetableEntry\\` \(
  \\`id\\` VARCHAR\(191\) NOT NULL,
  \\`school_id\\` VARCHAR\(191\) NOT NULL,
  \\`class_id\\` VARCHAR\(191\) NOT NULL,
  \\`subject_id\\` VARCHAR\(191\) NOT NULL,
  \\`teacher_id\\` VARCHAR\(191\) NULL,
  \\`day_of_week\\` INT NOT NULL,
  \\`period_number\\` INT NOT NULL,
  \\`start_time\\` VARCHAR\(10\) NOT NULL,
  \\`end_time\\` VARCHAR\(10\) NOT NULL,
  \\`room\\` VARCHAR\(100\) NULL,
  \\`created_at\\` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  \\`updated_at\\` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY \(\\`id\\`\),
  UNIQUE KEY \\`TimetableEntry_class_day_period_unique\\` \(\\`class_id\\`, \\`day_of_week\\`, \\`period_number\\`\),
  INDEX \\`TimetableEntry_school_id_idx\\` \(\\`school_id\\`\),
  INDEX \\`TimetableEntry_teacher_id_idx\\` \(\\`teacher_id\\`\),
  CONSTRAINT \\`TimetableEntry_school_id_fkey\\` FOREIGN KEY \(\\`school_id\\`\) REFERENCES \\`School\\` \(\\`id\\`\),
  CONSTRAINT \\`TimetableEntry_class_id_fkey\\` FOREIGN KEY \(\\`class_id\\`\) REFERENCES \\`Class\\` \(\\`id\\`\),
  CONSTRAINT \\`TimetableEntry_subject_id_fkey\\` FOREIGN KEY \(\\`subject_id\\`\) REFERENCES \\`Subject\\` \(\\`id\\`\),
  CONSTRAINT \\`TimetableEntry_teacher_id_fkey\\` FOREIGN KEY \(\\`teacher_id\\`\) REFERENCES \\`User\\` \(\\`id\\`\) ON DELETE SET NULL
\) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
" 2>&1)
